svg.text: Horizon Rise Concept — Definitive Flagship Identity
Engineered for timeless enterprise software platforms.

g.text: Apex Angle 60° | Golden Crossbar 61.8% | Wide Tracking +44%

svg.text: • Hidden Chevron 'A': The negative space between the horizon arc apex and the lower vertical flare of the star forms a subtle 'A' letterform.
• Horizon Rise Concept: Symbolizes a continuous upward trajectory, direction, clarity, and the boundless future of agentic AI software.
• 16×16 Scalability: Performs with 100% silhouette fidelity without relying on gradients, drop shadows, or decorative complexity.
• Longevity: Engineered to feel timeless, confident, and authoritative for enterprise software deployment up to 2036 and beyond.
